steps.title: Identify the stated limit
steps.content: The text says Google Places API data tend to be restricted to customer-facing places. That means the model may miss amenities that are not customer-facing.

steps.title: Choose the consequence
steps.content: Choice A follows directly: conclusions may not reflect all neighborhood amenities. Choice B introduces boundary problems. Choice C introduces unmentioned recent advancements. Choice D introduces outdated data, which the text never claims. The answer is A.
